meaning: n.彩色印片,<电影>染印法彩色
examples: Eleven institutions and companies from across Europe are contributing to FascinatE, including the BBC, Technicolor and Salford University.
I was seeing it all in glorious technicolor: mountains, valleys, lakes, summer sunshine.
One artist describes them as "the glorious, technicolor-dream-coat room where rocking horse people eat marshmallow pies".
When I was growing up, people used to talk about seeing the world in Technicolor.
Technicolor expects to have replacement discs available at retail no later than Tuesday, May 18.
